what_it_does: This file is a YAML-frontmatter attachment record in the channel-memory ledger that links the design-assets channel to an image asset named Icon_Gold_Ownership via an image:// URI.
observations: The entire content is YAML frontmatter with no body text.
It records an added timestamp of 2026-06-22T12:26:23.421854+00:00.
The file name is an opaque attachment id (att-5b3d426f).
standouts: The target URI image://design-assets/icons/Icon_Gold_Ownership is the only substantive pointer.
The record is extremely minimal, containing only identity, channel, type, target, and timestamp.
conventions: Follows a YAML frontmatter schema with id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added fields.
Uses a custom image:// URI scheme to address design assets.
concerns: The target asset name has no file extension, so the actual image format is not stated.
There is no uploader, checksum, dimensions, or MIME type, leaving the record thin for verification.
notes: A bare-bones ledger stub that records when an icon asset was attached to the design-assets channel.
questions: What image format and resolution does the target asset have?
Who or what process added this attachment?
Is image://design-assets/icons/Icon_Gold_Ownership resolvable by the current system?
purpose_vs_actual: Matches: the file is an attachment metadata record and it does nothing beyond pointing to an image asset in the design-assets channel.
intention_signals: It appears intended to create a durable, timestamped ledger entry that associates a specific design-assets image with a channel for later retrieval or audit.
contribution: It preserves the mapping between attachment id att-5b3d426f and the image asset Icon_Gold_Ownership in the design-assets channel, along with the attachment timestamp.
summary_for_embedding: A channel-memory attachment record in the design-assets channel pointing to the image asset Icon_Gold_Ownership via an image:// URI, created on 2026-06-22.
intention_for_embedding: This file was meant to catalog and timestamp an image attachment for a design-assets channel icon.
